title: bus.tengine.silo.crash v1
description: When: A silo process terminates abnormally due to a panic hook or Vulkan error handler. Source: /tengine. Emitted from the panic hook or VK error handler in the silo's runtime, providing the last frame before crash and diagnostic tail for post-mortem analysis.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

silo.description: Silo identifier where the crash occurred.

signal.description: Panic signal or error code that triggered the crash, e.g. SIGSEGV or a custom panic tag.

last_frame.description: Frame counter at time of crash; last successfully rendered frame before the process died.

stderr_tail.description: Last 20 lines of stderr or recent log output captured at crash time, providing context for the failure.

nvidia_tdr.description: True when the crash was triggered by NVIDIA Timeout Detection and Recovery; signals a GPU hardware timeout rather than a software fault.

vk_error_code.description: Vulkan error code returned by the driver at crash time; 0 indicates no Vulkan error was recorded.
